ddls:
CREATE TABLE "archetypes" (
  "archetype_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each archetype */,
  "archetype_name" TEXT /* Name of the archetype */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the archetype */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the archetype (e.g., Linear Fusion Rifle, Fusion Rifle) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("archetype_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rarity" (
  "rarity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rarity */,
  "rarity_name" TEXT /* Name of the rarity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rarity */,
  "drop_rate" TEXT /* Drop rate of the rarity (e.g., 0.05, 0.1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rarity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ammo_types" (
  "ammo_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ammo type */,
  "ammo_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the ammo type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ammo type */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the ammo type (e.g., 10, 20) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ammo_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "elements" (
  "element_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each element */,
  "element_name" TEXT /* Name of the element */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the element */,
  "damage_type" TEXT /* Damage type of the element (e.g., Solar, Arc, Stasis) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "requirements" (
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each requirement */,
  "requirement_name" TEXT /* Name of the requirement */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the requirement */,
  "level_requirement" INTEGER /* Level requirement for the requirement (e.g., 30, 40) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requirement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the source (e.g., Raid, Dungeon) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tiers" (
  "tier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tier */,
  "tier_name" TEXT /* Name of the tier */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tier */,
  "tier_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the tier (e.g., 1, 2) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "excels" (
  "excel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each excel */,
  "excel_name" TEXT /* Name of the excel */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the excel */,
  "excel_type" TEXT /* Type of the excel (e.g., PvE, PvP) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("excel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "slots" (
  "slot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each slot */,
  "slot_name" TEXT /* Name of the slot */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the slot */,
  "slot_type" TEXT /* Type of the slot (e.g., Heavy, Kinetic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("slot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "craftables" (
  "craftable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each craftable */,
  "craftable_name" TEXT /* Name of the craftable */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the craftable */,
  "crafting_materials" TEXT /* Materials required to craft the craftable (e.g., Glimmer, Shards) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("craftable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the season */,
  "season_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "season_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "best_of" (
  "best_of_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each best-of category */,
  "best_of_name" TEXT /* Name of the best-of category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the best-of category */,
  "ranking" INTEGER /* Ranking of the best-of category (e.g., 1, 2) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("best_of_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "perks" (
  "perk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each perk */,
  "perk_name" TEXT /* Name of the perk */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the perk */,
  "perk_type" TEXT /* Type of the perk (e.g., damage, handling) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("perk_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_progress" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "weapon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weapon being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the weapon was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, use) */,
  "progress" INTEGER /* User's progress with the weapon (e.g., 0, 100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "weapon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., player, game developer, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions of the role (e.g., read, write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "login_history" (
  "login_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each login */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who logged in */,
  "login_date" TEXT /* Date when the user logged in */,
  "logout_date" TEXT /* Date when the user logged out */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("login_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_login_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_logs" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date when the activity was performed */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of the activity (e.g., view, use) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loot_pool" (
  "loot_pool_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loot pool */,
  "loot_pool_name" TEXT /* Name of the loot pool */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the loot pool */,
  "loot_pool_type" TEXT /* Type of the loot pool (e.g., raid, dungeon) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loot_pool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weapon_loot_pool" (
  "weapon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weapon */,
  "loot_pool_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loot pool */,
  "drop_rate" TEXT /* Drop rate of the weapon in the loot pool (e.g., 0.05, 0.1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weapon_id", "loot_pool_id")
)
